VAL-REGRESS-001.details: GET /ethereum/price?token=0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2 returned price=2092.212808 (via chainlink feed). Price is within expected range $1500-$5000. WETH pricing unaffected by stablecoin changes.

VAL-REGRESS-002.details: GET /ethereum/price?token=0x6c3F90f043a72FA612cbac8115EE7e52BDe6E490 returned price=1.0398350564152203 (via curve lp source). Price > 0. Curve 3pool LP pricing still works correctly after stablecoin changes.

VAL-REGRESS-003.details: GET /ethereum/price?token=0x5f18C75AbDAe578b483E5F43f12a39cF75b973a9 returned price=1.236316 (via yearn or yearn-like source). Price > 0. Yearn yvUSDC vault pricing still works correctly after stablecoin/bucket changes.

assertions.title: Curve LP tokens still price correctly

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. WETH=$2092.21 (chainlink feed, in $1500-$5000 range), Curve 3pool LP=$1.04 (curve lp source, >0), Yearn yvUSDC=$1.24 (yearn-or-yearn-like source, >0). No regressions detected from stablecoin pricing changes.
